target:
# Good! The download page was captured in 2004-2005. Let me fetch it to find embedded screenshots
# First let's get the 2005 version of the download page
curl -m 60 -k --resolve "web.archive.org:443:207.241.237.3" -s "https://web.archive.org/web/20050213072729if_/http://www.pacificpoker.com:80/download" 2>&1 | grep -iE "img|src|screenshot|screen|\.jpg|\.gif|\.png" | head -40
